education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Environmental Science

experience.title: Junior Energy Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in the analysis of energy consumption data to identify trends and optimization opportunities.
Collaborated with engineering teams to conduct energy audits and develop efficiency recommendations.
Generated reports summarizing analysis findings and suggested actions for energy reduction.

experience.title: Data Analyst Intern
responsibilities: Conducted statistical analysis on energy usage patterns using Excel and SQL.
Support the development of renewable energy system assessments.
Prepared data visualizations to communicate insights effectively to stakeholders.

response.summary: Detail-oriented analyst with a Bachelor's in Environmental Science and experience in data analysis and energy efficiency projects. Strong proficiency in Excel and SQL, with foundational knowledge in Python and R.
